lines.english: Lesson 36
lines.chinese: 第36课
lines.raw: Lesson 36 | 第36课

lines.english: The cost of government
lines.chinese: 政府的开支
lines.raw: The cost of government | 政府的开支

lines.english: What's the most important factor, both in government or business, for keeping running costs low?
lines.chinese: 无论在政府还是企业中，降低运营成本最重要的因素是什么？
lines.raw: What's the most important factor, both in government or business, for keeping running costs low? | 无论在政府还是企业中，降低运营成本最重要的因素是什么？

lines.english: If a nation is essentialy disunited, it is left to the government to hold it together.
lines.chinese: 如果一个国家本质上是分裂的，就只能由政府来维系它的统一。
lines.raw: If a nation is essentialy disunited, it is left to the government to hold it together. | 如果一个国家本质上是分裂的，就只能由政府来维系它的统一。

lines.english: This increases the expense of government, and reduces correspondingly the amount of economic resources that could be used for developing the country.
lines.chinese: 这增加了政府开支，并相应减少了可用于国家发展的经济资源。
lines.raw: This increases the expense of government, and reduces correspondingly the amount of economic resources that could be used for developing the country. | 这增加了政府开支，并相应减少了可用于国家发展的经济资源。

lines.english: And it should not be forgotten how small those resources are in a poor and backward country.
lines.chinese: 而且不应忘记，在一个贫穷落后的国家，这些资源是多么微薄。
lines.raw: And it should not be forgotten how small those resources are in a poor and backward country. | 而且不应忘记，在一个贫穷落后的国家，这些资源是多么微薄。

lines.english: Where the cost of government is high, resources for development are correspondingly low.
lines.chinese: 政府开支高的地方，发展资源也相应地少。
lines.raw: Where the cost of government is high, resources for development are correspondingly low. | 政府开支高的地方，发展资源也相应地少。

lines.english: This may be illustrated by comparing the position of a nation with that of a private business enterprise.
lines.chinese: 这可以通过比较一个国家与一个私营企业的情况来说明。
lines.raw: This may be illustrated by comparing the position of a nation with that of a private business enterprise. | 这可以通过比较一个国家与一个私营企业的情况来说明。

lines.english: An enterprise has to incur certain costs and expenses in order to stay in business.
lines.chinese: 一个企业为了维持经营，必须承担一定的成本和开支。
lines.raw: An enterprise has to incur certain costs and expenses in order to stay in business. | 一个企业为了维持经营，必须承担一定的成本和开支。

lines.english: For our purposes, we are concerned only with one kind of cost--the cost of managing and administering the business.
lines.chinese: 就我们的目的而言，我们只关注一种成本——管理和经营企业的成本。
lines.raw: For our purposes, we are concerned only with one kind of cost--the cost of managing and administering the business. | 就我们的目的而言，我们只关注一种成本——管理和经营企业的成本。

lines.english: Such administrative overheads in a business are analogous to the cost of government in a nation.
lines.chinese: 企业中的此类行政管理费用类似于一个国家中的政府开支。
lines.raw: Such administrative overheads in a business are analogous to the cost of government in a nation. | 企业中的此类行政管理费用类似于一个国家中的政府开支。

lines.english: The administrative overheads of a business are low to the extent that everyone working in the business
lines.chinese: 企业的行政管理费用之所以低，是因为企业中的每个人
lines.raw: The administrative overheads of a business are low to the extent that everyone working in the business | 企业的行政管理费用之所以低，是因为企业中的每个人

lines.english: can be trusted to behave in a way that best promotes the interests of the firm.
lines.chinese: 都可以被信任，以最有利于公司利益的方式行事。
lines.raw: can be trusted to behave in a way that best promotes the interests of the firm. | 都可以被信任，以最有利于公司利益的方式行事。

lines.english: If they can each be trusted to take such responsibilities,
lines.chinese: 如果每个人都可以被信任来承担这些责任，
lines.raw: If they can each be trusted to take such responsibilities, | 如果每个人都可以被信任来承担这些责任，

lines.english: and to exercise such initiative as falls within their sphere, then administrative overheads will be low.
lines.chinese: 并在其职责范围内发挥主动性，那么行政管理费用就会很低。
lines.raw: and to exercise such initiative as falls within their sphere, then administrative overheads will be low. | 并在其职责范围内发挥主动性，那么行政管理费用就会很低。

lines.english: It will be low because it will be necessary to have only one man looking after each job without having another man to check upon what he is doing,
lines.chinese: 之所以低，是因为只需要一个人负责一项工作，而不需要另一个人来检查他正在做什么，
lines.raw: It will be low because it will be necessary to have only one man looking after each job without having another man to check upon what he is doing, | 之所以低，是因为只需要一个人负责一项工作，而不需要另一个人来检查他正在做什么，

lines.english: keep him in line, and report on him to someone else.
lines.chinese: 约束他，并向其他人汇报他的情况。
lines.raw: keep him in line, and report on him to someone else. | 约束他，并向其他人汇报他的情况。

lines.english: But if no one can be trusted to act in a loyal and responsible manner towards his job,
lines.chinese: 但如果没人能被信任以忠诚负责的态度对待自己的工作，
lines.raw: But if no one can be trusted to act in a loyal and responsible manner towards his job, | 但如果没人能被信任以忠诚负责的态度对待自己的工作，

lines.english: then the business will require armies of administrators, checkers and foremen and administrative overheads will rise correspondingly.
lines.chinese: 那么企业将需要大量的管理人员、检查员和工头，行政管理费用也将相应地增加。
lines.raw: then the business will require armies of administrators, checkers and foremen and administrative overheads will rise correspondingly. | 那么企业将需要大量的管理人员、检查员和工头，行政管理费用也将相应地增加。

lines.english: As administrative overheads rise, so the earnings of the business after meeting the expense of administration, will fall;
lines.chinese: 随着行政管理费用的增加，企业在支付行政开支后的收益将下降；
lines.raw: As administrative overheads rise, so the earnings of the business after meeting the expense of administration, will fall; | 随着行政管理费用的增加，企业在支付行政开支后的收益将下降；

lines.english: and the business will have less money to distribute as dividends or invest directly in its future progress and development.
lines.chinese: 企业将没有足够的资金来分配股息，或直接投资于其未来的发展。
lines.raw: and the business will have less money to distribute as dividends or invest directly in its future progress and development. | 企业将没有足够的资金来分配股息，或直接投资于其未来的发展。

lines.english: It is precisely the same with a nation.
lines.chinese: 一个国家也是如此。
lines.raw: It is precisely the same with a nation. | 一个国家也是如此。

lines.english: To the extent that the people can be relied on to behave in a loyal and responsible manner,
lines.chinese: 只要人民能够被信任以忠诚负责的方式行事，
lines.raw: To the extent that the people can be relied on to behave in a loyal and responsible manner, | 只要人民能够被信任以忠诚负责的方式行事，

lines.english: the government does not require armies of police and civil servants to keep them in order.
lines.chinese: 政府就不需要大批警察和公务员来维持秩序。
lines.raw: the government does not require armies of police and civil servants to keep them in order. | 政府就不需要大批警察和公务员来维持秩序。

lines.english: But if a nation is disunited, the government cannot be sure that the actions of the people will be in the interests of the nation;
lines.chinese: 但如果一个国家是分裂的，政府就不能确定人民的行为是否符合国家利益；
lines.raw: But if a nation is disunited, the government cannot be sure that the actions of the people will be in the interests of the nation; | 但如果一个国家是分裂的，政府就不能确定人民的行为是否符合国家利益；

lines.english: and it will have to watch, check, and control the people accordingly.
lines.chinese: 它就必须相应地监视、检查和控制人民。
lines.raw: and it will have to watch, check, and control the people accordingly. | 它就必须相应地监视、检查和控制人民。

lines.english: A disunited nation therefore has to incur unduly high costs of government.
lines.chinese: 因此，一个分裂的国家必然会产生过高的政府开支。
lines.raw: A disunited nation therefore has to incur unduly high costs of government. | 因此，一个分裂的国家必然会产生过高的政府开支。
